displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value:
1. Remove buns from the freezer and defrost
2. Steam at high heat for 6 - 8 minutes
3. Serve hot

displayMetadata.name: STORAGE INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
• Keep frozen at -18°C
• Onced thawed, do not refreeze

displayMetadata.name: INGREDIENTS
displayMetadata.value:
• Dough: Wheat Flour, Water, Yeast, Baking Powder (Corn Starch, Sodium Bicarbonate, Sodium Aluminium Phosphate, Monocalcium Phosphate), and Colouring (E127)
• Filling: Green Bean, Sugar, Water, Palm Olein, Peanut Oil, Sesame Oil and Lotus Seed
• Allergen advice: Contains gluten and nuts

metaData.Preparation:
• Steam:
Remove wrapper, steam shrimp shumai for about 10 minutes
• Deep frying:
1. Preheat oil to 170-180°C in ordinary saucepan
2. Place shumai in saucepan (Oil should cover shumai completely). Cook for 3-4 minutes until shumai is completely brown
• Microwave:
1. Cut off corner of the wrapper
2. Put the pack in microwave oven (800W) for about 2 minutes 30 seconds to 2 minutes 45 seconds at high power and serve
metaData.Storage Information: Must be kept in freezer below -18°C

metaData.Key Information:
• A Hong Kong style char siew bun
• The roasted chicken mix well with the Chinese BBQ sauce and wrapped with the pau dough
• Contain no preservatives
metaData.Preparation:
1. Prepare boiling water
2. Take out from freezer and remove wrapper, do not defrost
3. Steam frozen bun over boiling water for 5-6 minutes and serve
